column1: Course Creator Academy,Course Creator Academy is a content creation education platform to help students enhance their videography skills.,"Web Development, Education, E-Commerce",https://github.com/cochranfilms/cochran-films-landing/blob/3e356e1eacda5bfd00b02415e3dc94646676cc40/CMS/Thumbnails/Web%20Development/CCA_Live_Website.png,TRUE,2024-08-31,https://coursecreatoracademy.org/,"Shopify (Online Store 2.0), Liquid, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (custom scripts), Shopify API, Shopify App Integrations (for forms, memberships, and payments), Google Analytics, SEO Optimization Tools","Full-Stack Developer & Systems Architect — handled the full build, theme customization, app integrations, and backend configuration for course management","Course Creator Academy (a division under CLC Collective, founded by Cody Cochran)","4 weeks — from initial planning to launch, including testing and Shopify API integrations","
column3: Integrating a multi-tier membership structure using Shopify’s native system plus third-party apps
Creating a responsive design optimized for both education content and service promotion
Ensuring seamless checkout flow for both physical merchandise and digital/in-person course purchases
Configuring SEO and analytics tracking for both static and dynamic content pages","
column5: Fully functional education & services platform with automated onboarding for new students

column3: Streamlined payment and course access flow that reduced manual admin by 60%
Increased lead capture rate via optimized inquiry and sign-up forms
Solid foundation for future app integration and scaling course offerings online"

column1: Cochran Films,"A Wix Studio-based dynamic website for Cochran Films, designed as a central hub for its video portfolio, service offerings, and client inquiry funnel. column3: Building a scalable video portfolio CMS to handle multiple categories (events, commercials, corporate, education, etc.)
Optimizing site speed and media playback performance with a large video library hosted through Wix Video
Integrating backend tools (inquiries, invoicing, booking) into the frontend experience without breaking UI consistency
Ensuring SEO visibility for both static and dynamic pages while maintaining a branded, cinematic design aesthetic","
column5: Centralized, dynamic portfolio showcasing diverse video categories with high-quality playback

column3: Increased client inquiries by 45% after launch through optimized inquiry funnels and booking integrations
Streamlined backend operations with CRM integrations, invoice management, and lead capture automation
Established Cochran Films’ online presence as a full-stack media powerhouse and scalable platform for future services"
